description: Feeling or inspiring optimism about a future outcome. 'Wiroa' names the quality of positive anticipation—the heart that looks toward possibility with confidence.
sound_symbolism: The word reaches toward tomorrow. 'Wi' begins with openness, possibility welcomed. 'Ro' rolls forward with momentum, hope building. Finally 'a' opens to the future, anticipation bright.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'wiroa miona' (hopeful person). Essential to solarpunk vision—hope as practice, not passive wishing. The verb is 'soliru' (hope).

pillars.solarpunk-values: Hope is active—believing better futures are possible while working to create them.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Wise hope recognizes impermanence—things can change, suffering is not permanent, liberation is possible.
